customer "1"
  name: "Test Customer"
  currency: CAD

taxtable "GST"
  entry:
    account: "Liabilities:GST"
    rate: 5.0%
    type: PERCENT

invoice "INV-2026-001"
  customer_id: "1"
  currency: CAD
  date_opened: 2026-01-01
  entry:
    date: 2026-01-01
    description: "Test Entry"
    action: "Hours"
    account: "Income:Sales"
    quantity: 1
    price: 100
    taxable: true
    tax_included: false
    tax_table: "GST"
  posted:
    date: 2026-01-01
    due: 2026-01-31
    ar_account: "Assets:Accounts Receivable"
    memo: "Invoice INV-2026-001"
    accumulate: true
